root.rep_text: รายงานผังบัญชี A3

account_level.text: ระดับบัญชี

account_type_name.text: ประเภทบัญชี

account_close_id.text: ปิดบัญชีโอนไป

balance_begin.text: ยอดยกมาต้นปี

root.sql: SELECT sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id, sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name, sc_acc_m_account_master.account_type_id, sc_acc_m_account_master.account_group_id, sc_acc_m_account_master.account_control_id, sc_acc_m_account_master.account_close_id, sc_acc_m_account_master.account_level, (case sc_acc_m_account_master.nature when 'DR' then 'เดบิต' when 'CR' then 'เครดิต' end) as nature, sc_acc_m_ucf_account_group.account_group_name, sc_acc_m_ucf_account_type.account_type_name, coalesce((SELECT sc_acc_m_account_begin.balance_begin FROM sc_acc_m_account_begin WHERE sc_acc_m_account_begin.account_id = sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id AND sc_acc_m_account_begin.account_year = ('!account_year_1!')::numeric ),0) AS balance_begin FROM sc_acc_m_account_master, sc_acc_m_ucf_account_group, sc_acc_m_ucf_account_type WHERE ( sc_acc_m_account_master.account_group_id = sc_acc_m_ucf_account_group.account_group_id ) AND ( sc_acc_m_account_master.account_type_id = sc_acc_m_ucf_account_type.account_type_id ) /*WHERE*/ ORDER BY sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id
